headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on CenterPoint Energy, Raises Price Target to $47
summary: Keybanc  analyst Sophie Karp   maintains CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $41 to $47.
